mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI_FOLDER ( HOMPI_ID, FOLDER_ID,FOLDER_NAME, CONTENTS_TYPE, AVAIL_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{hompiId}, #{folderId}, #{folderName}, #{contentsType}, #{availStatus}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FOLDER_NAME = #{folderName}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{folderName}

choose.when: 다이어리 <--> SELECT DIARY_ID AS CONTENT_ID, DATE_FORMAT(INSERT_DT, '%Y%m%d') AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_DIARY WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
사진첩 <--> SELECT BOARD_ID AS CONTENT_ID, HOMPI_BOARD_TITLE AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_BOARD WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
게시판 <--> SELECT BOARD_ID AS CONTENT_ID, HOMPI_BOARD_TITLE AS CONTENT_NAME FROM HOMPI_BOARD WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId}
